creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Moin moin 

Here's a patch to update to 0.16.6
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-games-multimc-update-to-0.16.6.patch

What it does not do is handle the secret stuff that is required to login via the microsoft account... but maybe someone can take it the rest of the way :)


mfg Tobias
